Sun Microsystems acquired Forte Software in August 1999 for approximately $540M in stock. This validated Aberdeen's prediction of strong enterprise value. Source: Forbes, CNET, Wired (August 1999).
Post-Sun acquisition, Forte was rebranded Sun Forte Developer then discontinued as Sun pivoted to Java/NetBeans. The EAI capability (Forte Fusion) was the acquisition driver.
